    <item>
        <guid>nba529691</guid>
        <title>CJ McCollum: Drops 32 points in win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/cj-mccollum-3437</link>
        <description>McCollum tallied 32 points (12-22 FG, 3-10 3Pt, 5-7 FT), six assists, three rebounds, two steals and one block across 35 minutes in Monday's 107-106 Game 2 win over the Knicks in the first round of the Eastern Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 20 Apr 2026 7:54:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529687</guid>
        <title>Scottie Barnes: Leads Raps with 26 points in Game 2</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/scottie-barnes-5390</link>
        <description>Barnes posted 26 points (11-19 FG, 1-4 3Pt, 3-4 FT), five assists, four rebounds, two steals and one block over 40 minutes during the Raptors' 115-105 Game 2 loss to the Cavaliers in the first round of the Eastern Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 20 Apr 2026 6:53:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529685</guid>
        <title>James Harden: Logs five swipes in Game 2 win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/james-harden-3018</link>
        <description>Harden logged 28 points (9-14 FG, 3-8 3Pt, 7-10 FT), five rebounds, four assists, five steals and one block over 35 minutes during Monday's 115-105 Game 2 win over Toronto in the first round of the Eastern Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 20 Apr 2026 6:46:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529684</guid>
        <title>Donovan Mitchell: Another 30-point performance</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/donovan-mitchell-4166</link>
        <description>Mitchell registered 30 points (13-23 FG, 4-10 3Pt, 0-1 FT), seven rebounds, five assists and one steal over 37 minutes in Monday's 115-105 Game 2 win over the Raptors in the first round of the Eastern Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 20 Apr 2026 6:43:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529680</guid>
        <title>Austin Reaves: Confirmed out for Game 2</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/austin-reaves-5334</link>
        <description>Reaves (oblique) has been ruled out for Tuesday's Game 2 of the first-round series against the Rockets.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 20 Apr 2026 5:01:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
